  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-app-middleware/input.js:4:9

4 | app.use((ctx, next) => next());
   |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Use explicit route handlers or defer app.use(fn) until compiler middleware emission lands.
